faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Hicksville typically ranges from $350 for minor infestations to $2,000 for severe cases requiring extensive treatment. The final cost depends on colony size, number of entry points, property size, and whether structural damage has occurred. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants or regular ants in my Hicksville home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common ants (up to 5/8 inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. Unlike termites, they don't eat wood but excavate it to build nests, leaving behind piles of sawdust-like material called frass. You may also hear faint rustling sounds inside walls or see large winged ants (swarmers) in spring, indicating an established colony.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Hicksville, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are very common throughout Hicksville and Long Island due to the abundance of wooded areas, mature trees, and the region's humidity. They're particularly active from spring through fall and are attracted to moisture-damaged wood, making homes with leaky roofs, poor drainage, or water damage especially vulnerable to infestation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in my Hicksville home?
faqs.answer: Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and next-day service for Hicksville residents in most cases. Initial treatment typically takes 1-3 hours depending on your property size and infestation severity. Most homeowners see significant results within 7-14 days, with follow-up visits scheduled as needed to ensure complete colony elimination and prevent re-infestation.
